text: Focus assist Choose which notification you'd like to see and hear so you can stay focused. The rest will go straight to action center where you can see them any time. ® off Get all notifications from your apps and contacts QO Priority only See only selected notifications from the priority list. The rest will go straight to action center. Customize your priority list O Alarms only Hide all notifications, except for alarms Automatic rules Choose the times and activities when you don't want to be disturbed, and focus assist will turn on automatically.
